articles.title: IRS Seized $3,500,000,000 in Crypto Assets in Fiscal Year 2021
articles.description: The U.S. Internal Revenue Service (IRS) is revealing that it confiscated billions of dollars in cryptocurrency during the 2021 fiscal year. The IRS says in a report that its Criminal Investigation’s Cyber Crime Unit (CI CCU) seized approximately $3.5 billion in cryptocurrency this year.
